description: Single-line text input with 5 sizes, multiple states (rest/hover/focus/error/positive/disabled/readOnly), start/end enhancer slots, clearable button, password toggle, and FormField context integration.

id.description: Input element ID. Auto-provided by FormField context, or set directly.

size.description: Size variant. Controls height, padding, gap, typography, icon size, and border-radius.

error.description: Error state. Changes background/border to error colors. Shows AlertIcon. Auto-provided by FormField context.

positive.description: Success state. Shows CheckIcon in success color. Background/border remain in normal state.

disabled.description: Disabled state. Muted colors, cursor-not-allowed. Auto-provided by FormField context.

readOnly.description: Read-only state. Subtle background, no hover overlay. Auto-provided by FormField context.

clearable.description: Shows clear (X) button when input has a value and is not disabled/readOnly.

clearOnEscape.description: When true and clearable, pressing Escape clears the input via onClear callback.

startEnhancer.description: Left slot. String renders as text (prefix typography), ReactNode renders as icon (icon size map).

endEnhancer.description: Right slot. Renders after validation icon, password toggle, and clear button.

type.description: Input type. 'password' auto-inserts eye/eye-off toggle button.

fullWidth.description: When true, container is w-full. When false, w-fit with min-w-[200px].

pill.description: Overrides border-radius to 9999px for fully rounded appearance.

onClear.description: Callback when clear button is clicked or Escape is pressed (if clearOnEscape).

value.description: Controlled value. Used for clearable value tracking.

placeholder.description: Placeholder text with dedicated color token.

hover.description: State overlay via sibling <span> with group-hover class.

pressed.description: State overlay via sibling <span> with group-active class.

focused.keyboardFocusRing: --comp-textfield-focus-ring → semantic-neutral-solid-300 (ring-2 ring-offset-2, keyboard focus only via pointerRef detection)

positive.description: Background and border remain in normal state. Only CheckIcon shown in success color.

disabled.behavior: cursor-not-allowed, no hover overlay, no clear/password toggle

readOnly.behavior: No hover overlay, no clear button

implementation.stateOverlay: Absolute <span> sibling with group-hover/group-active. Hidden when disabled or readOnly.
implementation.focusDetection: pointerRef tracks mouse vs keyboard focus. ring-2 only shown for keyboard focus (keyboardFocused state).
implementation.passwordToggle: Auto-inserted when type='password'. Toggles between 'text' and 'password' effectiveType. Uses EyeIcon/EyeOffIcon inline SVGs.
implementation.clearButton: Shown when clearable && hasValue && !disabled && !readOnly. tabIndex={-1}. Calls onClear callback. XIcon inline SVG.
implementation.validationIcon: AlertIcon for error, CheckIcon for positive. Shown when !disabled && (error || positive).
implementation.enhancerSlots: startEnhancer/endEnhancer: string → text span with typography, ReactNode → icon span with iconSizeMap. Both get disabled color override.
implementation.formFieldIntegration: Merges id, error, disabled, readOnly, required from FormField context. Context values serve as fallback (prop overrides).
implementation.ariaAttributes: aria-invalid (error), aria-disabled, aria-required, aria-describedby (FormField description + bottom message IDs).
implementation.slotOrder: startEnhancer → input → validationIcon → passwordToggle → clearButton → endEnhancer
